ResearchProjectDef.label: Skyfeather pipe
ResearchProjectDef.description: Craft a hand-carved pipe packed with the oiled feathers of the legendary Harpeagle.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Mossmire draught
ResearchProjectDef.description: Begin producing a thick, potent green draught brewed from mossmire milk and rare forest roots. Its use traces back to the rites of elder shamans, who claimed it opened the body to the will of the spirits. Those who drank it emerged from their wounds faster, eyes glazed with fevered strength but not without a price. The forest does not grant gifts freely. The brew burns hot, clouds the mind, and leaves a weight in the blood that lingers for days.
